# EMAクロス戦略
def strategy(ctx, params):
    ta = ctx.ta
    fast_n = int(params.get("fast", 12))
    slow_n = int(params.get("slow", 26))

    fast = ta.ema(ctx.close, fast_n)
    slow = ta.ema(ctx.close, slow_n)

    ctx.plot(fast, title=f"EMA{fast_n}")
    ctx.plot(slow, title=f"EMA{slow_n}")

    if ta.crossover(fast, slow):
        ctx.strategy.entry("long", ctx.strategy.long)
    elif ta.crossunder(fast, slow):
        ctx.strategy.close("long")
